label: plain_text
text:
If the lines intersect at a point, then that point gives the unique solution of the two
equations. In this case, the pair of equations is consistent.
If the lines coincide, then there are infinitely many solutions — each point on
11
the line being a solution. In this case, the pair of equations is dependent
(consistent).
If the lines are parallel, then the pair of equations has no solution. In this case, the
111
pair of equations is inconsistent.
